metadata.description: Resource name prefix (2-8 chars, used for all resource naming)
Object ID of the deploying user/SP (grants Key Vault Secrets Officer for secret creation). Populated by deploy script.
Azure region for all resources
AAD Object ID for SQL administrator (user or group)
AAD display name for SQL administrator
SuperAdmin password for Knowz application initial setup
Tags applied to all resources (organizations typically add their own via Azure Policy)
Deploy Azure OpenAI (false = use external OpenAI endpoint)
External OpenAI endpoint (required when deployOpenAI is false)
External OpenAI API key (required when deployOpenAI is false)
Name of existing Azure OpenAI resource to reuse (leave empty to deploy new or use external)
Resource group of existing OpenAI resource (defaults to current RG)
Chat model deployment name (must match appsettings DeploymentName)
Embedding deployment name (must match appsettings EmbeddingDeploymentName)
Deploy Azure AI Vision for image/diagram analysis (caption, tags, objects, OCR)
External Azure AI Vision endpoint (required when deployVision is false)
External Azure AI Vision API key (required when deployVision is false)
Name of existing Azure AI Vision resource to reuse (leave empty to deploy new or use external)
Resource group of existing Vision resource (defaults to current RG)
Deploy Azure Document Intelligence for advanced document extraction
External Document Intelligence endpoint (required when deployDocumentIntelligence is false)
External Document Intelligence API key (required when deployDocumentIntelligence is false)
Name of existing Document Intelligence resource to reuse (leave empty to deploy new or use external)
Resource group of existing Document Intelligence resource (defaults to current RG)
Azure AI Search SKU (enterprise requires standard or higher for private endpoint support)
Container image tag (e.g., latest, v1.0.0)
Container registry username (empty = public GHCR)
Container registry password (empty = public GHCR)
API key for the selfhosted API. Auto-generated if not provided.
JWT signing secret. Must be at least 32 characters. Auto-generated if not provided.

properties.scriptContent:
param($SqlServerFqdn, $DatabaseName, $AadAdminObjectId, $AadAdminDisplayName)
      Install-Module -Name SqlServer -Force -AllowClobber -Scope CurrentUser
      $token = (Get-AzAccessToken -ResourceUrl "https://database.windows.net/").Token
      $query = @"
        IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.database_principals WHERE name = '$AadAdminDisplayName')
        BEGIN
          CREATE USER [$AadAdminDisplayName] WITH SID = $(CONVERT(varbinary(16), '$AadAdminObjectId')), TYPE = E;
          ALTER ROLE db_owner ADD MEMBER [$AadAdminDisplayName];
        END
"@
      Invoke-Sqlcmd -ServerInstance $SqlServerFqdn -Database $DatabaseName -AccessToken $token -Query $query

properties.value: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog=McpKnowledge;Authentication=Active Directory Managed Identity;User Id={1};Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName')), '2023-08-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-identity', parameters('prefix'))), '2023-01-31').clientId)]
